_comment: Note-derived clinical data for the demo IBD patient. In production these fields are populated by LLM extraction from clinic notes at the time of the clinical decision. FHIR-structured data (labs, meds, conditions) takes precedence; this file fills the gaps.

endoscopy.finding: Moderate ileocolonic inflammation with deep ulcers in terminal ileum and patchy colonic involvement. Partial mucosal response to prior therapy. No active perianal disease on exam.
